decision_subject.description: The exact UI attribute being decided.

selected_visual_type.description: Exact selected UI pattern or treatment. Must not be only an adjective or concept name.

base_color_or_surface.description: Exact token, hex approximation, CSS value or named surface. Must not be only an abstract mood.

size_or_coverage.description: Where and how much of the component/screen the decision covers.

density_limits.description: Concrete quantity or density limits, e.g. number of layers, lines, dots, cards or elements.

visual_weight.description: Concrete visual prominence, percentage, opacity, hierarchy or relative weight.

position_behavior.description: Placement and distribution behavior when relevant.

relationship_to_main_element.description: How this decision behaves relative to the main UI element or action.

implementation_format.description: Implementation target such as SVG/CSS, component token, vector asset, layout rule or prompt instruction.

short_generator_prompt.description: Clean short prompt for image/render generation when applicable.
